name: t3d
description: Marketplace for the t3d Claude Code plugin — a small DDD + TDD harness (hooks, layer rules, project templates, drift-audit skill).

plugins.name: t3d
plugins.description: DDD + TDD harness: bounded-context layout, layer-purity hooks, red-green-refactor enforcement, project templates, periodic drift-audit + session-log mining (t3d-sinkin), plus a starter PITFALLS.md.
